name: @chart-review/pipeline-extract-adherence
description: Adherence skill-loader. Reads references/{questions,rules,attribution.yaml} from a chart-review-<taskId> bundle and returns the tier-grouped question framework + RuleDefinitions consumed by the agent run-loop (infra-batch-run) and the deterministic rule-engine. The direct-LLM extractor + OMOP verifier are intentionally omitted in concur — adherence runs the agentic MCP loop (set_question_answer), not direct extraction.
